category_sources: source_facts.description identifies LMDB as a Lightning memory-mapped key-value database.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lmdb; source_facts.description expands it as Lightning memory-mapped database.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Symas LMDB product page; source_facts.repo points to the official OpenLDAP source repository containing LMDB.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says key-value data store and Lightning memory-mapped database; source_facts.executables lists LMDB command-line utilities.
